economic_mechanism: Rapid expansion from narrow to broad sector participation inside an already positive SPY trend may reflect distributed institutional demand and slow position diffusion, creating incremental ten-session upside versus high-breadth but non-thrust same-regime controls.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact BROAD_SECTOR_BREADTH_THRUST_SPY_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / BROAD_SECTOR_BREADTH_THRUST_FORWARD_DRIFT on SPY with fixed present-day XLB/XLC/XLE/XLF/XLI/XLK/XLP/XLRE/XLU/XLV/XLY breadth panel; future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide SPY bull-call debit spread only, capital_fit_usd=200, frictionless structural max_loss_usd=200 only when debit <=200, max_lots=1; zero option pricing and no capital seat.
falsifier: Close at F0 for fewer than 20 train pairs or eight signal years; any chronology/overlap/reuse violation; treated ten-session mean after labeled 10 bps <=+0.50%; positive frequency <55%; paired excess <+0.25%; one-sided 90% three-signal-date block-bootstrap lower bound <=0; worst-decile mean below -3.00%; or high-breadth non-thrust control equal/better.

strategy_advancement.summary: No funnel movement: exact breadth-thrust mechanism and nearby same-panel retunes closed at F0; no option, F1/F2/L1, capital-seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority.

search_information.summary: The wake falsified one new participation-acceleration mechanism and added tested machine-readable match geometry, authority labels, density/tail boundaries, and an anti-retune quarantine without opening the sealed holdout.

useful_deltas.summary: Train n20 across five years failed mechanism specificity: treated +0.245246% versus control +0.370614%, paired -0.125368%, LB90 -0.883946%, thin worst-decile n2 -6.981542%; holdout14 remained unread.

Breadth event/control evidence now serializes calendar/breadth/return/HV match distances, year counts, worst-decile n, boolean advancement, split F2/L1 authority, and explicit option-horizon limits, all under behavioral and negative-control tests.
Quarantine expands beyond the exact thresholds to nearby same-panel breadth/thrust/control/SMA and 5-15-session horizon retunes; reopening requires a materially new mechanism or evidence class.

critic_findings.finding: F1 quarantine was too narrow and allowed nearby same-panel threshold, horizon, and SMA polish after train inspection.
critic_findings.rationale: Canonical machinery now enumerates the nearby same-panel retune class and requires a materially new mechanism or evidence class to reopen; unit coverage asserts the quarantine surface.

critic_findings.finding: F2/F3 match-quality diagnostics were absent and strategy_advancement was a prose string instead of a boolean.
critic_findings.rationale: Train residue now serializes four match-distance summaries and machine boolean false with a separate summary; the finalizer reproduced 12/68/360 calendar distances and the exact economic metrics.

critic_findings.finding: F4/F5/F6/F7 durable registration and claim labels needed closed-family orientation residue, year-density context, thin-tail n, and explicit underlying-versus-option horizon limits.
critic_findings.rationale: The handoff registers candidate/family/nearby-retune closures; machinery emits year counts, dynamic panel floor, worst_decile_n=2, and no full-DTE option validation language under tests.

critic_findings.finding: F8 suggested the epoch counting might need correction beyond the executor update.
critic_findings.rationale: No further correction is warranted: configs/search_epoch.json records completed_strategy_decisions=2, consecutive_no_strategy_advance=2, strategy_pivot_required=true, strategy_burst_stop_required=false, latest FAMILY_CLOSED, and preserves the explicit pure-RTH-append streak exemption exactly as the challenger independently accepted.

critic_findings.finding: F9 required an independent finalizer rerun of focused and full verification rather than relying on executor counts.
critic_findings.rationale: Finalizer reran focused 13/13, full unittest 373/373, and full pytest 383 plus 18 subtests green after the repair test failed first and then passed.

critic_findings.finding: F10 preferred split funnel and authority labels when touching the legacy combined f2_or_l1_claim flag.
critic_findings.rationale: Compatibility flag remains false and new explicit f2_claim=false and l1_or_capital_seat_claim=false fields are asserted by tests.

closed_families: BROAD_SECTOR_BREADTH_THRUST_FORWARD_DRIFT: same present-day SPY plus eleven-sector panel with nearby breadth 8-10/11, five-session thrust/control-band, 5-15-session horizon, SMA50/SMA100, or same novelty-class retunes without a materially new mechanism or control design
next: TSLL_OBSERVED_TERM_CARRY_DATA_OR_MATERIALLY_DIFFERENT_L0_PIVOT: use exactly one branch per wake—distinct weekday-RTH and frozen 12-date/3-cycle/20-path/8-control floor unmet -> append one provenance-safe all-expiration TSLL snapshot and report counters only, EVIDENCE_WAIT reaffirmation streak-exempt; off-hours -> materially different non-quarantined mechanism/evidence class outside sector-breadth directional continuation and all integrated closed families; observed floor met -> evaluate exact parked diagonal development 60% and keep final 40% unread. No same-date churn, same-panel breadth retune, holdout salvage, registry/paper force, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live action.
